### IV. | FORMAT FLEXIBILITY

Course materials can be built in:
- PDF Reader Kits
- Online Modular Courses (Notion, Teachable, etc.)
- Zines + Mini Textbooks
- Studio Labs (for VR, multimedia, gallery format)
- Open GitHub Repos with lessons + artifacts

---

### V. | FUTURE GOALS

- Host an open curriculum online (Creative Myth Systems)
- Collaborate with institutions without dependence on them
- Generate recursive curriculum templates for community remixing
- Issue certificates, badges, or rites-of-passage for system mastery

---
